summary: Iteration 69: Product-Specific Intake Fields feature fully tested. All 5 product templates (Canada PR, Australia PR, UK Skilled Worker, Student, USA H-1B) working correctly. Backend API returns base sections + product-specific sections based on keyword matching. Frontend InfoSheetEditor displays product sections with orange left border after base sections, with expandable/collapsible functionality and proper field rendering (text, date, select types).
seed_data_creation: None - used existing client case (LEAMSS-2024-0001) with Canada PR product
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 69 verified Product-Specific Intake Fields feature. Key findings: 1) Backend PRODUCT_INTAKE_FIELDS dict contains 5 products with keyword matching. 2) GET /api/cases/info-sheet-schema/{product_name} returns {sections, product_sections, product_label, total_fields}. 3) Canada PR has 3 product sections (Language Scores 9 fields, ECA 4 fields, Express Entry 7 fields). 4) Australia PR has 3 sections (Skills Assessment, English Test, Points Claim). 5) UK Skilled Worker has 1 section (CoS Details). 6) Student has 1 section (Admission Details). 7) USA H-1B has 1 section (H-1B Employer). 8) Frontend InfoSheetEditor loads product-specific schema using caseData.product_name. 9) Product sections rendered with orange left border (border-l-[#f7620b]) and orange badge divider. 10) All field types (text, date, select) render correctly with proper options. 11) Sections are expandable/collapsible. 12) Save functionality works - data persists.

api_base_schema.details: Returns 6 base sections (personal_details, family_chart, dependent_children, migrating_dependents, qualifications, employment)

api_canada_pr_schema.details: Returns base + 3 product sections (language_scores 9 fields, eca_details 4 fields, express_entry_details 7 fields). Label: 'Canada PR (Express Entry) - Additional Fields'

api_australia_pr_schema.details: Returns base + 3 product sections (skills_assessment, english_test_au, points_claim)

api_uk_skilled_worker_schema.details: Returns base + 1 product section (cos_details with 7 fields)

api_student_schema.details: Returns base + 1 product section (admission_details with 10 fields)

api_usa_h1b_schema.details: Returns base + 1 product section (h1b_employer with 10 fields)

api_unknown_product.details: Returns base sections only with empty product_sections and product_label

frontend_product_badge.details: Orange badge 'Canada PR (Express Entry) - Additional Fields' displayed between base and product sections

frontend_orange_border.details: 3 product sections have orange left border (border-l-[#f7620b])

frontend_expand_collapse.details: Product sections are expandable/collapsible like base sections. Toggle works correctly.

frontend_field_rendering.details: All field types render correctly: text inputs, date pickers, select dropdowns with proper options

frontend_select_options.details: ECA body dropdown shows all options (WES, IQAS, CES, ICAS, PEBC, MCC, NCDEA). Language test shows (IELTS General, CELPIP General, PTE Core, TEF Canada, TCF Canada)

frontend_save_functionality.details: Client can fill and save product-specific fields. Save button enables on changes, toast confirms success.
